research_questions: What architecture differences exist between agentic RAG and traditional RAG?

claim_evidence_map.research_question: What architecture differences exist between agentic RAG and traditional RAG?
claim_evidence_map.claim: Agentic RAG architecture uses iterative planning loops for multi-hop retrieval.

evidence.title: Agentic RAG Loops
evidence.snippet: Iterative planning loops improve multi-hop retrieval quality.

evidence.title: Traditional vs Agentic RAG
evidence.snippet: Agentic orchestration decomposes and refines retrieval steps.

claim_evidence_map.caveat: Domain transfer can still require prompt tuning.
